markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AI wins and align on a new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Wins Confirm Impact:** CashflowDesk (CFD) is now a top source in Google AI overviews for high-value queries like "better expense management than Mercury," directly citing CFD content and positioning RAMP as a top alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** Adopt a hybrid model for LLM citation. Use short, hyper-specific articles for known-context queries and longer-form content for conceptual topics requiring pre-education.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [**Project Structure Confirmed:** The project remains in its "sprint" phase with the current team (William, George, managing editor) until March to ensure a stable build before the standard Phase 2 handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Topics

### Project Structure & Timeline

  - [The project remains in its "sprint" phase until March, extending the standard 8-week Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To ensure a stable build for this custom project before the standard Phase 2 handoff to a new team.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [The current team (William, George, managing editor) will continue managing the project through March.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### AI Citation Wins

  - [CFD is now a top source in Google AI overviews for key queries, directly citing CFD articles and positioning RAMP as a primary alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Example Queries & RAMP Positioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - "better expense management than Mercury" → RAMP \#1 alternative
      - ["best software for tailspend management" → RAMP cited](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - "Brex alternatives for bootstrap companies" → CFD \#2 source
      - ["switch from Brex to RAMP" → 2 CFD citations](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - "Mercury's main competitors for startup banking" → CFD \#1 source, RAMP main competitor
  - [**Key Finding:** Direct quotes from CFD articles are appearing verbatim in AI overviews, confirming the content's direct influence.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### Content Strategy for LLM Citation

  - [**Goal:** Increase citation for broader, high-value queries (e.g., "finout concept") by breaking them into hyper-specific articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Debate:**](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Victoria's Position:** Short, specific articles (e.g., 300 words) with aligned URLs/titles increase LLM retrieval probability.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**William's Position:** Past tests showed short articles lacked "SEO juice" and were not cited.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Resolution → Hybrid Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [**Short-Form:** For known-context queries (e.g., "What is X?").](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**Long-Form:** For conceptual topics requiring pre-education.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Victoria will review content proposals in Airtable to identify sections that should be split into new, specific articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Technical & Admin Updates

  - [**Airtable Access:** Resolved; Victoria now has access.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [**Content Review Workflow:** William will work with Hassan to restructure Airtable statuses, making it easier for Victoria to find and review upcoming keywords before writing begins.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Crawling Status:** Scrunch confirms pages are now being crawled, not just the `robots.txt` file.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Insight:** Explicitly allowing crawlers in the sitemap was a key factor for this new site, a practice that may be less critical for sites with high domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
      - [Share the action points summary in the team channel.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
      - [Provide Victoria with the specific CFD articles cited in the AI wins.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Work with Hassan to restructure Airtable statuses for easier content review.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Victoria:**](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
      - [Review upcoming keywords in Airtable and provide feedback on splitting topics into new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ncQhbtcan1JdMp5435Ea225z1whzV6yk?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
